events.title: Lincoln Road Farmer’s Market
events.description: On Meridian Avenue through Washington Avenue, local vendors gather along Lincoln Road to sell fruits, vegetables, fresh-cut flowers and more. Rain or shine, guests are welcome to explore the area to find regional treasures. Every Sunday at 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM on Lincoln Road.

events.title: Orquesta Akokán
events.description: Orquesta Akokán is a Grammy-nominated Afro-Cuban big band that blends mambo, jazz, and traditional Cuban rhythms into a vibrant, high-energy live experience. Featuring world-class musicians, the group channels the golden era of Cuban music while bringing a fresh, modern edge to the stage.

events.title: Concentración del Hincha Celeste
events.description: Calentamos motores antes del partido de Uruguay con un encuentro lleno de energía, música y pasión. DJ Sanata pone el ritmo para unir a la afición en una previa inolvidable—cánticos, baile y toda la garra charrúa en un solo lugar. NEW YORK CITY: SPINT IT FORWARD
The Juneteenth Experience
events.description: The Juneteenth Experience, Hued Songs’ flagship celebration of the federal holiday marking June 19, 1865, returns for its 6th year to the Miami Beach Bandshell, where it began. NEW YORK CITY: SPINT IT FORWARD
The Rock And Roll Playhouse
events.description: The Rock and Roll Playhouse is the nation’s largest family concert series, introducing kids to classic rock through live music, dancing, storytelling, and interactive fun. Founded at Brooklyn Bowl, the series brings family-friendly performances to venues nationwide, inspiring the next generation of music lovers.

events.title: Juvenile
events.description: Juvenile is a pioneering New Orleans MC whose influence on Southern hip-hop spans nearly three decades. Emerging from the Magnolia Projects, he helped bring Louisiana bounce to a global audience through his work with Cash Money Records and producer Mannie Fresh. events.description: Join in on the fútbol fever with Rhythm of the Cup: a series of community watch parties and featured live concerts to celebrate and get into the global spirit. On June 22nd, join us at the Bandshell to watch Argentina take on Austria. Expect big-screen viewing, food & beverage offerings, and outdoor match-day energy steps from the ocean. events.title: High Fade
events.description: High Fade will bring their unique blend of Scottish punk-funk to Miami Beach for the very first time. The band will be out in full force to help their Scottish friends and family support the Scottish national soccer team, as they prepare for their match with Brazil the following day!

events.title: Thievery Corporation
events.description: Thievery Corporation , the Washington, D.C. duo of Rob Garza and Eric Hilton, are pioneers of genre-defying electronic music. Since their 1996 debut Sounds from the Thievery Hi-Fi , they’ve blended downtempo, dub, bossa nova, reggae, jazz, and global influences into a signature sound. July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park
events.description: Miami-Dade County's largest County-supported Fourth of July celebration, presented in partnership with Univision: live musical performances, DJs, food vendors, family-friendly activities, patriotic fun, and an evening fireworks show.
events.sourceName: Miami-Dade July 4th Spectacular at Tropical Park

events.title: 4th of July Celebration: North Beach
events.description: Starting at 5 PM dance to live music and let the kids have fun in the family zone. Music performances take the stage with entertainment by DJ Luc, MC Maria Salas and The Miami Beats Band. events.title: Poolside
events.description: Poolside will bring their signature ‘daytime disco’ sound to Miami! The band has reached new heights as a formidable 5-piece ensemble, comprised of accomplished veteran players who have left indelible marks on indie rock and electronic music over the course of the last two decades. Presented By GMP Live & Dayglo Presents.

events.title: David Rivera y la Bámbula
events.description: Rooted in Puerto Rican bomba y plena, and electrified with Afro-Cuban, jazz, and global rhythms, David Rivera y la Bámbula blends tradition with a fresh, modern sound. events.title: Chromeo
events.description: Chromeo will bring their signature electro-funk sound and thrilling live show for the finale of the Rhythm Of The Cup event series! This show will take place the night before the Bronze Medal match of the World Cup. Presented by GMP Live & Dayglo Presents.
